news.title:
Ramky Infra sold 51% stake in Visakha Pharmacity for INR 165.2 Cr.
Subsidiary's FY25 turnover and PAT were INR 40.9 Cr and INR 29.7 Cr.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra sold 51% stake in Visakha Pharmacity for INR 165.2 Cr.
Subsidiary's FY25 turnover and PAT were INR 40.9 Cr and INR 29.7 Cr.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd's board approved selling its stake in Visakha Pharmacity Ltd to Brij Gopal Construction Co.
The MD and CFO are authorized to finalize and execute the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on behalf of the board.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd's board approved selling its stake in Visakha Pharmacity Ltd to Brij Gopal Construction Co.
The MD and CFO are authorized to finalize and execute the Share Purchase Agreement (SPA) on behalf of the board.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure's credit rating upgraded by Infomerics to IVR BBB with stable outlook.
Upgrade based on FY25 audited and 9M FY26 unaudited operational, financial performance.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure's credit rating upgraded by Infomerics to IVR BBB with stable outlook.
Upgrade based on FY25 audited and 9M FY26 unaudited operational, financial performance.

news.title:
Ramky Infra rises 3.6% to Rs 474.35 on MIDC pharma park project win.
Project involves DBFOT contract for pharma park in Raigad district via PPP.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra rises 3.6% to Rs 474.35 on MIDC pharma park project win.
Project involves DBFOT contract for pharma park in Raigad district via PPP.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd signs 95-year PPP deal with MIDC for a High-Tech Pharma Park in Maharashtra.
The INR 3,000 Cr project spans 1,000 hectares, generating revenue via lease premiums, development & operational charges.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd signs 95-year PPP deal with MIDC for a High-Tech Pharma Park in Maharashtra.
The INR 3,000 Cr project spans 1,000 hectares, generating revenue via lease premiums, development & operational charges.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure's unit Maha Integrated Life Sciences wins MIDC concession agreement.
Total project cost for Ramky Infrastructure estimated at ₹30 billion.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure's unit Maha Integrated Life Sciences wins MIDC concession agreement.
Total project cost for Ramky Infrastructure estimated at ₹30 billion.

news.title:
Ramky Infra approves strategic plan to acquire a water and wastewater management firm in India.
The acquisition aims to enhance service offerings and expand its footprint in the environmental sector.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra approves strategic plan to acquire a water and wastewater management firm in India.
The acquisition aims to enhance service offerings and expand its footprint in the environmental sector.

news.title: Silverleaf Capital Services Pvt Ltd bought 589,697 shares of Ramky Infra Ltd at an avg price of 483.5.
news.summary: Silverleaf Capital Services Pvt Ltd bought 589,697 shares of Ramky Infra Ltd at an avg price of 483.5.

news.title: Ramky Infra shares surged over 12% in early trade after winning a Maharashtra govt order.
news.summary: Ramky Infra shares surged over 12% in early trade after winning a Maharashtra govt order.

news.title:
Ramky Infra wins ₹1,402 crore EPC contract for DPIA project, Phase 1.
Project covers design, construction, O&M; shares down 3.4%, closing at ₹430 on BSE.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra wins ₹1,402 crore EPC contract for DPIA project, Phase 1.
Project covers design, construction, O&M; shares down 3.4%, closing at ₹430 on BSE.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure secures ₹1401.84 Cr contract for MITL project in DMIC Corridor.
Project entails roads, water, power, sewerage, ICT infra; completion in 930 days + 4 years O&M.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure secures ₹1401.84 Cr contract for MITL project in DMIC Corridor.
Project entails roads, water, power, sewerage, ICT infra; completion in 930 days + 4 years O&M.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure wins 14.01B INR EPC contract for Dighi Port Industrial Area.
Contract awarded by MITL highlights Ramky Infrastructure's capabilities in large projects.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure wins 14.01B INR EPC contract for Dighi Port Industrial Area.
Contract awarded by MITL highlights Ramky Infrastructure's capabilities in large projects.

news.title:
NCLT approved Ramky Infrastructure subsidiaries' amalgamation, effective 01.04.2024.
Transferor firms to dissolve without winding up; compliance to continue.
news.summary:
NCLT approved Ramky Infrastructure subsidiaries' amalgamation, effective 01.04.2024.
Transferor firms to dissolve without winding up; compliance to continue.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure released Q3 FY25-26 results, covering financials till Dec 2025.
The ISO-certified firm highlights a strong order book and growth pipeline across sectors.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure released Q3 FY25-26 results, covering financials till Dec 2025.
The ISO-certified firm highlights a strong order book and growth pipeline across sectors.

news.title:
Ramky Infra's Q3 net profit rose 39.4% to ₹78.5 crore, revenue up 6.5% to ₹489 crore.
EBITDA declined 15.2% to ₹76 crore, with margins contracting to 15.5% from 19.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra's Q3 net profit rose 39.4% to ₹78.5 crore, revenue up 6.5% to ₹489 crore.
EBITDA declined 15.2% to ₹76 crore, with margins contracting to 15.5% from 19.5% YoY.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for 7th February 2026.
Meeting will review and approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financials and auditor's report.
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd's board meeting is scheduled for 7th February 2026.
Meeting will review and approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financials and auditor's report.

news.title:
Ramky Infra's order book stands at ₹10,000 crore, including ₹1,000 crore in international orders.
Focus is on EPC, HAM, O&M projects, ensuring balanced revenues and long-term cash flows.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra's order book stands at ₹10,000 crore, including ₹1,000 crore in international orders.
Focus is on EPC, HAM, O&M projects, ensuring balanced revenues and long-term cash flows.

news.title:
Ramky Infra's CEO projects new orders worth ₹30B by January end.
The company holds lowest bids for two major projects totaling ₹30B.
news.summary:
Ramky Infra's CEO projects new orders worth ₹30B by January end.
The company holds lowest bids for two major projects totaling ₹30B.

news.title:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd held its Q2 FY26 earnings call, reporting revenue of INR 444 crore and emphasizing a strong presence in industrial, water, and urban infrastructure sectors.
The company highlighted a robust order book of INR 9,200 crore, with key segments including industrial (INR 4,000 crore) and water/wastewater (INR 2,700 crore).
news.summary:
Ramky Infrastructure Ltd held its Q2 FY26 earnings call, reporting revenue of INR 444 crore and emphasizing a strong presence in industrial, water, and urban infrastructure sectors.
The company highlighted a robust order book of INR 9,200 crore, with key segments including industrial (INR 4,000 crore) and water/wastewater (INR 2,700 crore).

news.title: Ramky Infra targets Rs.2,400 Cr turnover for FY26, supported by a Rs.9,200 Cr order book.
news.summary: Ramky Infra targets Rs.2,400 Cr turnover for FY26, supported by a Rs.9,200 Cr order book.
